_note: How the agent talks about its own mode so it is always honest (RULE 9 / CLAUDE.md §20). In WHATSAPP_MODE=mock nothing is real — the strings under `mock` are appended to replies so the agent never implies a real action happened. When WHATSAPP_MODE=live is properly configured, the `live` (empty) tags are used instead so the extra demo wording disappears. The agent knows its mode from settings.py.

mock.order_tag: (Demo mode — not connected to a live order system yet.)
mock.support_tag: (Demo mode — not connected to a live support team yet.)
mock.booking_ack: Demo mode — I've created a mock booking request for testing.
mock.tracking_unavailable: Demo mode — live order tracking is not connected yet.
